query:
SELECT a.id, a.name, a.email, a.isActive, a.programId, p.name AS programName, a.consultorId, a.turmaId
FROM alunos a 
LEFT JOIN programs p ON a.programId = p.id
WHERE a.name LIKE '%Julia%'
ORDER BY a.name;
